title: Senior Doctor - AIIMS Delhi Ventures Solutions - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - AIIMS Delhi Ventures Solutions - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
AIIMS Delhi Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Raipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About AIIMS Delhi Ventures Solutions:
AIIMS Delhi Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIIMS Delhi Ventures Solutions!
